input_text: Sem ni aku ambil 6 subjek kat UiTM, memang packed gila jadual tapi nak graduate cepat. Doakan aku survive ya korang.
reason: Student sharing about heavy course load at UiTM, asking for support. Normal student life content.

input_text: Baru start jadi Grab driver part time lepas kelas. Sehari boleh dapat RM80-100, lumayan la untuk student macam aku.
reason: Student sharing gig economy experience as Grab driver. Positive, factual content about earning income.

input_text: Siapa lagi tengok MLBB M5 Malaysia semalam? MPL MY memang underrated, kita ada talent tapi kurang exposure je.
reason: Commentary on Malaysian esports scene with positive sentiment about local talent.

input_text: Cafe study kat area UM memang banyak pilihan sekarang. Aku selalu pergi Alibi sebab wifi laju dan kopi murah.
reason: Student recommending a study cafe near university. Harmless lifestyle content.

input_text: Aku rasa fresh grad sekarang kena ada side hustle at least satu. Gaji RM2500 kat KL memang tak cukup bro.
reason: Financial advice for fresh graduates about cost of living. Factual observation about salary adequacy.

input_text: Assignment group project ni memang satu benda yang aku tak rindu lepas graduate. Mesti ada satu orang tak buat kerja.
reason: Humorous relatable complaint about group projects in university. Common student experience.

input_text: Dah hantar resume kat 50 tempat, baru dapat 3 interview. Job market untuk fresh grad memang tough tahun ni.
reason: Sharing job search struggles as a fresh graduate. Relatable career discussion.

input_text: Kakak aku kerja freelance graphic design, income tak tetap tapi dia cakap freedom tu priceless. Respect la hustle dia.
reason: Positive commentary about sibling's freelancing career choice. Supportive tone.

input_text: Mental health awareness kat Malaysia dah jauh lebih baik dari dulu. Sekarang cakap pasal anxiety pun orang dah faham.
reason: Positive observation about improving mental health awareness in Malaysia.

input_text: Jangan mudah percaya kalau orang DM korang cakap boleh buat duit senang. 90% tu scam, terutama yang suruh bayar dulu.
reason: Digital scam awareness advice warning youth about common online scams. Public safety content.

input_text: Baru join hackathon pertama aku kat Sunway. Tak menang pun tapi experience tu memang invaluable, banyak belajar dari mentor.
reason: Sharing positive hackathon experience at Sunway. Encouraging entrepreneurship and learning.

input_text: Korang ada tak tips untuk survive sem akhir? Aku dah burnout teruk ni tapi kena push sikit lagi.
reason: Student seeking advice about managing burnout in final semester. Normal peer support request.

input_text: PTPTN loan tu memang berat la untuk fresh grad. Tapi kalau bayar awal dapat diskaun, at least ada silver lining.
reason: Discussion about student loan repayment with practical tip about early payment discount.

input_text: Aku baru discover Malaysian gaming community kat Discord. Ramai gila orang main Valorant, boleh cari team senang je.
reason: Sharing discovery of Malaysian gaming community online. Positive social connection content.

input_text: Nasi lemak tepi jalan RM1.50 lagi best dari cafe hipster RM15. Ini fakta, bukan pendapat.
reason: Humorous food comparison about nasi lemak pricing. Lighthearted cultural content.

input_text: USM student sini. Library 24 jam tu memang penyelamat hidup aku masa exam week. Tidur pun kat situ je kadang.
reason: Student sharing relatable exam week experience at USM library. Normal campus life.

input_text: Aku rasa kita perlu lebih banyak startup incubator kat Malaysia. MDEC dah buat banyak tapi masih ada gap lagi.
reason: Constructive opinion about startup ecosystem development in Malaysia.

input_text: Baru lepas interview online, terus tetiba wifi putus tengah-tengah. Rasa macam nak nangis tapi kena act cool.
reason: Sharing embarrassing online interview experience. Humorous, relatable content.

input_text: TikTok Malaysia content creator sekarang dah level lain. Production value tinggi, bukan macam dulu asal viral je.
reason: Positive commentary about improving quality of Malaysian TikTok content.

input_text: Foodpanda rider aku tadi siap hantar makanan naik tingkat 5 sebab lift rosak. Bagi tip extra la bro, dorang deserve.
reason: Appreciating food delivery rider's effort and encouraging tipping. Positive gig economy commentary.

input_text: Sem depan nak ambil elective Mandarin kat HELP. Bukan senang tapi nak tambah skill untuk job market nanti.
reason: Student planning to learn Mandarin for career development. Positive language learning intent.

input_text: Gaji pertama memang rasa macam banyak tapi lepas tolak sewa, makan, transport, tinggal sikit je. Welcome to adult life.
reason: Relatable observation about first salary and cost of living for fresh graduates.

input_text: Aku dah uninstall Twitter seminggu, produktiviti naik 200%. Highly recommend kalau korang nak fokus study.
reason: Personal productivity tip about reducing social media usage. Positive self-improvement advice.

input_text: Resume aku reject lagi satu. Tapi takpe, setiap rejection tu satu step closer to the right job. Keep going.
reason: Self-motivational post about job search resilience. Positive, encouraging content.

input_text: Kalau korang nak belajar coding free, Cuba tengok CS50 kat YouTube. Aku belajar dari situ dan sekarang dah boleh buat website sendiri.
reason: Sharing free coding education resource and personal success story. Helpful learning advice.

input_text: Bilik sewa kat PJ area sekarang RM700 dah kira murah tau. Dulu RM400 boleh dapat master room, sekarang dapat bilik kecil je.
reason: Factual commentary about rising rental costs in PJ affecting youth.

input_text: Aku kagum dengan budak-budak sekarang yang umur 20 dah ada bisnes sendiri. Masa aku umur 20 lagi struggle nak siapkan thesis.
reason: Admiring young entrepreneurs while humorously comparing personal experience. Positive tone.

input_text: Scammer sekarang makin canggih, guna AI voice clone lagi. Kalau family call minta duit, double check dulu before transfer.
reason: Scam awareness warning about AI voice cloning tactics. Valuable public safety advice.

input_text: Aku rasa internship unpaid tu patut dah dimansuhkan. Student pun perlu duit nak survive, bukan kerja free je.
reason: Opinion against unpaid internships advocating for fair compensation. Constructive labor discussion.

input_text: YouTube algorithm aku sekarang penuh dengan Malaysian food review. Not complaining, memang layan pun tengok orang makan.
reason: Lighthearted comment about YouTube algorithm showing food content. Harmless entertainment.

input_text: Anime convention kat KLCC haritu best gila. Cosplayer Malaysia memang talented, siap buat props sendiri semua.
reason: Positive review of anime convention and appreciation for Malaysian cosplayers' skills.

input_text: Tahun depan nak cuba apply YC dari Malaysia. Kalau tak try, memang takkan tahu kan. Startup kena berani ambil risiko.
reason: Aspirational post about applying to Y Combinator. Encouraging entrepreneurship.

input_text: Lepas habis degree, aku rasa gap year travel Southeast Asia dulu before kerja. Nak cari diri sendiri kejap.
reason: Post about planning a gap year for self-discovery. Normal life planning discussion.

input_text: Exam dah dekat tapi aku masih binge watch K-drama. Procrastination level: legendary. Esok baru study la kot.
reason: Self-deprecating humor about procrastination during exam season. Relatable student content.

input_text: Ada sesiapa sini guna Shopee sebagai side income? Aku nak start jual handmade jewelry tapi tak tahu macam mana nak promote.
reason: Seeking e-commerce advice for starting small business on Shopee. Entrepreneurial discussion.

input_text: Honestly the Malaysian startup ecosystem has grown so much. We have Carsome, Aerodyne, and more unicorns coming. Proud of our founders.
reason: Positive commentary on Malaysian startup ecosystem success stories.

input_text: Just finished my final sem at UM and I genuinely don't know what I'm doing with my life. Quarter life crisis is real yall.
reason: Relatable post about post-graduation uncertainty. Common quarter-life crisis sentiment.

input_text: The LinkedIn culture in Malaysia is getting out of hand. Not everything needs to be a humble brag disguised as a life lesson.
reason: Social media culture critique about LinkedIn posts. Humorous observation without targeting individuals.

input_text: PSA: if someone texts you saying they're from LHDN and you owe taxes, it's a scam. LHDN does not operate that way. Stay safe.
reason: Public service announcement about tax scam impersonating LHDN. Digital safety awareness.

input_text: Malaysian esports teams keep punching above their weight at international tournaments. We need more corporate sponsors to back them up.
reason: Advocacy for more esports sponsorship in Malaysia. Positive and constructive.

input_text: Did my first food delivery shift on Grab today. Made RM65 in 4 hours. Not amazing but decent for a uni student honestly.
reason: Sharing first gig economy experience with realistic earnings. Informative content.

input_text: The fact that we have to pay RM150 for a parking spot at work in KL is criminal. Fresh grads really out here struggling.
reason: Complaint about parking costs in KL affecting fresh graduates. Cost of living discussion.

input_text: Online classes taught me one thing: I can multitask between a lecture and cooking maggi at the same time. Peak efficiency.
reason: Humorous take on online learning multitasking. Lighthearted student content.

input_text: Shoutout to all Malaysian content creators who are actually making educational content instead of just drama. Yall the real MVPs.
reason: Appreciation for educational content creators in Malaysia. Positive community support.

input_text: If you're a fresh grad, please negotiate your salary. The worst they can say is no. Don't sell yourself short.
reason: Career advice encouraging salary negotiation. Empowering content for fresh graduates.

input_text: KL rent plus student loan plus car payment is basically my entire salary. Adulting in Malaysia is not for the weak.
reason: Relatable financial stress commentary about cost of living for young working adults.

input_text: The KPOP community in Malaysia is honestly one of the most organized fandoms I've seen. Concert ticketing strategy level CIA.
reason: Humorous praise for Malaysian K-pop fandom's organizational skills.

input_text: Went to a coding bootcamp in Cyberjaya last weekend. The amount of talent coming out of Malaysian universities is seriously impressive.
reason: Positive observation about Malaysian tech talent from coding bootcamp experience.

input_text: I keep getting crypto scam DMs on Instagram. Reported like 10 accounts this week alone. Please be careful out there guys.
reason: Warning about crypto scam DMs on social media. Digital safety awareness content.

input_text: Career fairs at Malaysian unis need to stop being just banking and Big 4 booths. Where are the tech startups and creative agencies?
reason: Constructive feedback about university career fair diversity. Advocacy for broader representation.

input_text: Sunway University's campus honestly gives main character energy. Studying there feels like being in a drama set sometimes.
reason: Lighthearted compliment about Sunway University campus aesthetics.

input_text: Mental health days should be normalized in Malaysian workplaces. Burnout is not a flex, it's a problem we need to address.
reason: Mental health advocacy for workplace policy change. Constructive and important discussion.

input_text: The amount of unpaid overtime expected from fresh grads in Malaysia is honestly not okay. We need better labor awareness.
reason: Labor rights awareness post about unpaid overtime. Constructive workplace critique.

input_text: My Grab driver just now was a retired teacher doing part time. We had the deepest conversation about life. 5 stars uncle.
reason: Positive story about interaction with a Grab driver. Wholesome gig economy narrative.

input_text: Malaysian gaming cafes are making a comeback and I'm here for it. Nothing beats LAN party vibes with the boys.
reason: Positive sentiment about gaming cafe culture in Malaysia. Harmless entertainment content.

input_text: Just applied to 3 different tech companies in Penang. The tech scene there is growing fast, might not need to move to KL after all.
reason: Optimistic job search update highlighting Penang's growing tech sector.

input_text: 大学生活真的很忙，每天赶assignment到半夜。不过在马来西亚读书还是值得的，学费比较合理。
reason: Student discussing busy university life in Malaysia and reasonable tuition fees. Normal academic content.

input_text: 刚从Sunway毕业，找工作真的不容易。投了好多简历，希望快点收到好消息吧。
reason: Fresh graduate from Sunway sharing job search experience. Relatable career content.

input_text: 马来西亚的电竞发展越来越好了，MLBB的比赛水平真的很高。希望政府继续支持。
reason: Positive commentary on Malaysian esports development with hope for government support.

input_text: 在KL租房真的贵，一个小房间要七八百。刚出来工作的年轻人压力很大。
reason: Discussion about high rental costs in KL for young working adults. Cost of living commentary.

input_text: 网上那些说能快速赚钱的广告千万别信，我朋友就是被骗了几千块。大家小心啊。
reason: Scam awareness warning based on friend's experience. Digital safety content.

input_text: 马来西亚的K-pop粉丝真的很厉害，每次有演唱会票秒光。大家抢票的速度太快了。
reason: Lighthearted observation about K-pop fandom and concert ticket demand in Malaysia.

input_text: 最近开始在Shopee卖手工皂，虽然赚不多但是很有成就感。年轻人创业就是要敢尝试。
reason: Sharing small business experience on Shopee. Encouraging youth entrepreneurship.

input_text: 心理健康真的很重要，在马来西亚现在越来越多人开始关注这个话题了。如果不开心要记得找人聊聊。
reason: Mental health awareness message encouraging people to seek support. Positive health advocacy.

input_text: 做Grab司机的副业还不错，放学后跑几单可以赚点零花钱。时间自由是最大的好处。
reason: Positive experience as part-time Grab driver. Informative gig economy content.

input_text: 马来西亚的YouTube博主越来越专业了，内容质量比以前好太多。支持本地创作者！
reason: Praising improving quality of Malaysian YouTubers. Supportive local creator commentary.

input_text: 在线上课其实也有好处，可以录下来重复看。不过还是怀念在大学里面的日子。
reason: Balanced view of online learning with nostalgia for campus life. Normal student content.

input_text: Coding bootcamp现在很流行，学三个月就能找到IT工作。马来西亚科技行业需要更多人才。
reason: Observation about coding bootcamp popularity and tech talent demand in Malaysia.

input_text: 我觉得大学应该多教一些理财知识，很多年轻人毕业后不懂得管理自己的钱。
reason: Constructive suggestion for financial literacy education in universities.

input_text: 动漫展在马来西亚越来越受欢迎了，上次在KLCC的那个人山人海。Cosplay的水平真的很高。
reason: Positive review of anime convention in Malaysia praising cosplay quality.

input_text: பல்கலைக்கழகத்தில் படிக்கும் நேரம் மிக வேகமாக போகிறது. USM-ல் இன்னும் ஒரு செமஸ்டர் தான், நிறைய கற்றுக்கொண்டேன்.
reason: Student reflecting on time passing quickly at USM. Positive academic life content.

input_text: இணையத்தில் வேலை தேடுவது எளிதல்ல, ஆனால் தொடர்ந்து முயற்சி செய்ய வேண்டும். மலேசியாவில் IT துறையில் வாய்ப்புகள் அதிகம்.
reason: Motivational job search advice highlighting IT opportunities in Malaysia.

input_text: Grab உணவு விநியோகம் செய்வது கடினமான வேலை. ஆனால் நேரத்தை நாமே தேர்வு செய்யலாம் என்பது நல்ல விஷயம்.
reason: Balanced view of food delivery gig work acknowledging difficulty but appreciating flexibility.

input_text: மலேசியாவில் கேமிங் கலாச்சாரம் வளர்ந்து வருகிறது. இளைஞர்களுக்கு இது ஒரு நல்ல தொழில் வாய்ப்பாக மாறலாம்.
reason: Positive observation about gaming culture growth and career potential in Malaysia.

input_text: ஆன்லைன் மோசடிகள் பற்றி எச்சரிக்கையாக இருங்கள். யாரேனும் OTP கேட்டால் கொடுக்காதீர்கள், அது scam தான்.
reason: Digital scam awareness warning about OTP fraud. Public safety content.

input_text: புதிதாக வேலைக்கு சேர்ந்த இளைஞர்களுக்கு KL-ல் வாழ்க்கை செலவு மிக அதிகம். சம்பளம் போதவில்லை என்பது உண்மை தான்.
reason: Factual discussion about high cost of living in KL for fresh graduates.

input_text: மனநல விழிப்புணர்வு மிக முக்கியம். மன அழுத்தம் இருந்தால் நண்பர்களிடமோ நிபுணர்களிடமோ பேசுங்கள்.
reason: Mental health awareness message encouraging seeking support. Positive health advocacy.

input_text: TikTok-ல் மலேசிய படைப்பாளிகள் சிறப்பாக செயல்படுகிறார்கள். நம் நாட்டின் கலாச்சாரத்தை உலகுக்கு காட்டுகிறார்கள்.
reason: Praising Malaysian TikTok creators for showcasing culture globally. Positive content.

input_text: Freelance வேலை செய்வது சுதந்திரமாக இருக்கிறது, ஆனால் வருமானம் நிலையாக இல்லை. இரண்டிலும் நல்லதும் கெட்டதும் உண்டு.
reason: Balanced discussion about freelancing pros and cons. Informative career content.

input_text: கணினி அறிவியல் படிப்பது கஷ்டமாக இருக்கிறது ஆனால் எதிர்காலத்தில் நல்ல வேலை வாய்ப்புகள் உண்டு. பொறுமையாக இருங்கள்.
reason: Encouraging students studying computer science about future career prospects.

input_text: Bro aku main Valorant rank Diamond dah kat MY server, tapi teammates always go AFK one. Susah nak climb like this la wei.
reason: Mixed Malay-English gaming complaint about AFK teammates in Valorant. Normal gaming frustration.

input_text: Just balik dari interview kat Bangsar, the interviewer tanya why I want to work there and aku blank kejap. Hopefully still can la.
reason: Mixed language sharing of job interview experience. Relatable career content.

input_text: Weh korang perasan tak Malaysian TikTok sekarang full of financial advice? Some legit, some cap je. Kena pandai filter la.
reason: Commentary on financial advice on TikTok with reminder to be discerning. Media literacy content.

input_text: Aku baru try freelance kat Fiverr, first client review 5 stars bro. Small win but I'm so happy right now honestly.
reason: Celebrating first positive freelancing review on Fiverr. Encouraging entrepreneurship.

input_text: K-drama marathon sampai pukul 4 pagi then esok ada 8am class. The struggle of being a K-drama fan and student at the same time.
reason: Humorous relatable content about balancing K-drama watching with student responsibilities.

input_text: Delivery rider kat Malaysia ni underappreciated gila. Hujan panas semua redah, kita bagi tip sikit je pun diorang happy. Respect.
reason: Appreciating delivery riders' hard work in all weather conditions. Positive gig economy awareness.

input_text: Startup life memang no joke. Kawan aku pivot dah 3 kali before finding product-market fit. Persistence is key la bro.
reason: Sharing startup journey highlighting persistence. Encouraging entrepreneurship content.

input_text: Baru sedar yang aku spend almost RM500 sebulan kat food delivery apps je. Need to start masak sendiri dah ni, save money sikit.
reason: Self-reflection about food delivery spending with intention to cook more. Financial awareness content.

input_text: UiTM orientation week was wild la, tapi best sebab dapat kenal ramai orang baru. University life really hits different.
reason: Positive experience sharing about university orientation week at UiTM.

input_text: GPT ni memang game changer for students tapi jangan la fully depend on it. Kena belajar jugak, bukan copy paste je bro.
reason: Balanced advice about using AI tools responsibly in education. Constructive tech commentary.

input_text: Aku pergi anime fest kat Mid Valley last week, the cosplayers memang next level. Ada sorang buat full Gundam armor from scratch.
reason: Praising cosplay craftsmanship at anime festival. Positive fandom content.

input_text: Sesiapa nak join study group untuk CFA exam? We meet every Saturday kat library Sunway. Open for anyone yang interested.
reason: Study group invitation for CFA exam preparation. Positive academic community building.

input_text: Scam call lagi hari ni, cakap from Bank Negara konon. Bro, Bank Negara takkan call you asking for your IC number. Stay alert everyone.
reason: Warning about phone scam impersonating Bank Negara. Important digital safety awareness.

input_text: Career kat creative industry Malaysia memang underrated. Graphic designer, video editor, semua in demand sekarang but people still think it's not a real job.
reason: Advocating for recognition of creative industry careers in Malaysia. Constructive career discussion.

input_text: Aku dah habis bayar PTPTN semalam, officially debt free. Took me 4 years tapi alhamdulillah it's done. Never give up korang.
reason: Celebrating student loan payoff milestone with encouragement for others. Motivational content.

input_text: Thinking of switching from accounting to UX design. The demand for UX in Malaysia is growing and honestly the work seems way more fulfilling.
reason: Career transition consideration from accounting to UX design. Constructive career planning.

input_text: Started a small Discord server for Malaysian uni students to share internship tips. Already got 200 members in a week, love this community.
reason: Sharing success of community-building initiative for Malaysian students. Positive social content.

input_text: The coworking space culture in KL is actually pretty solid now. RM300 a month for a hot desk with good wifi beats working from home.
reason: Positive review of coworking spaces in KL with pricing info. Helpful workspace advice.

input_text: Being a fresh grad in 2026 is basically applying to jobs as a full time job. LinkedIn Easy Apply is both a blessing and a curse honestly.
reason: Humorous observation about the modern job application process for fresh graduates.

input_text: 马来西亚的共享办公空间越来越多了，对自由职业者来说真的很方便。价格也还算合理。
reason: Positive commentary about growth of coworking spaces in Malaysia for freelancers.
